name: Notion
description: Official local Notion MCP server wrapped for Orbyt's bundled stdio extension runtime.

auth.instructions: Create a Notion internal integration, copy its integration secret, and connect the pages or data sources you want Orbyt to access.

tools.name: API-get-user
tools.description: Retrieve a Notion user by id.

tools.name: API-get-users
tools.description: List users in the Notion workspace.

tools.name: API-get-self
tools.description: Retrieve the bot user associated with the Notion integration token.

tools.name: API-post-search
tools.description: Search Notion pages and data sources available to the integration.

tools.name: API-get-block-children
tools.description: Retrieve child blocks for a Notion block or page.

tools.name: API-patch-block-children
tools.description: Append child blocks to a Notion block or page.

tools.name: API-retrieve-a-block
tools.description: Retrieve a Notion block by id.

tools.name: API-update-a-block
tools.description: Update a Notion block.

tools.name: API-delete-a-block
tools.description: Delete or archive a Notion block.

tools.name: API-retrieve-a-page
tools.description: Retrieve a Notion page by id.

tools.name: API-patch-page
tools.description: Update a Notion page.

tools.name: API-post-page
tools.description: Create a Notion page.

tools.name: API-retrieve-a-page-property
tools.description: Retrieve a Notion page property item.

tools.name: API-retrieve-a-comment
tools.description: Retrieve comments for a Notion block or page.

tools.name: API-create-a-comment
tools.description: Create a Notion comment.

tools.name: API-query-data-source
tools.description: Query a Notion data source.

tools.name: API-retrieve-a-data-source
tools.description: Retrieve Notion data source metadata and schema.

tools.name: API-update-a-data-source
tools.description: Update a Notion data source.

tools.name: API-create-a-data-source
tools.description: Create a Notion data source.

tools.name: API-list-data-source-templates
tools.description: List templates available in a Notion data source.

tools.name: API-retrieve-a-database
tools.description: Retrieve Notion database metadata including data source ids.

tools.name: API-move-page
tools.description: Move a Notion page to a different parent.

author: orbyt
